title: Eco-Ethnography: A methodological protocol for an anthropology of global climate urgency
author: Pype, Katrien
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Eco-ethnography combines an ethnographic and anthropological approach to citizen science that understands socio-cultural-environmental relationships through a wider perspective and attends deeply to context. This methodological  protocol offers a collaborative approach to knowledge production, that is, co-creation among scientists, citizens, and citizen scientists, and a transdisciplinary lens which fosters novel insights and yields profound understandings of the complexities at stake. This document  served as a preliminary protocol prior to the launching of fieldwork and facilitated their achievements.
